issue.title: massgrave.dev

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://massgrave.dev/windows_ltsc_links](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmassgrave.dev%2Fwindows_ltsc_links) ### Comment > Хочу сообщить о ложном срабатывании фильтра безопасности для домена buzzheavier.com. Ваш сервис блокирует его, помечая как вредоносный сайт. > > Этот ресурс используется проектом Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) для хранения оригинальных ISO-образов Windows. Файлы, размещенные там, проходят проверку и соответствуют официальным хэш-суммам MVS/OEM. Это легитимный ресурс для пользователей проекта, и блокировка препятствует доступу к проверенным образам системы. > > Прошу провести повторную проверку данного домена. Если на нем не обнаружено реального вредоносного контента, пожалуйста, рассмотрите возможность исключения его из черного списка. ``` Username: @Spok1 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9wg6qwfu9swg8k0k84ogc80gw00s0sws5bh6hdv2hw.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2oh7mx10ah8g484soks4ogsgcws888widctfhweg34.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.7 (5271) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.19045.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter,
AdGuard Ukrainian filter Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC

**Windows Tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID,
Disable WAP Push Message Routing Service,
Disable Windows Recall

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.google/dns-query`
filters: `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Assistant (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/assistant/4.3/assistant.user.js)`
`AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.7+%285271%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.19045.0&browser=chrome&filters=1.2.3.4.17.18.19.20.21.22.23&custom_filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.servers=https%3A%2F%2Fdns.google%2Fdns-query&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Assistant%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fassistant%252F4.3%252Fassistant.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Popup%2520Blocker%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fpopup-blocker%252F2.5%252Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=false&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=true&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)
